description_long: This is a modern, rectangular storage cabinet with a light wood finish on the top, sides, and legs, and smooth, matte white panels on the front. The cabinet features two side doors and a central section with an open shelf above a single drawer, providing both concealed and open storage options. The legs are angled outward, giving the piece a mid-century modern aesthetic and elevating it off the ground. The top surface is flat and spacious, suitable for placing decorative items or electronics. The cabinet's clean lines and minimalist design make it suitable for contemporary urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or residential living rooms. No visible handles are present, suggesting a push-to-open mechanism for the doors and drawer.
description: A modern, light wood and white cabinet with angled legs, two side doors, a central open shelf, and a drawer. Its minimalist design and flat top make it suitable for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the closed, seamless white panel doors and the light wood top and legs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the light wood grain texture and the cabinet's depth, with no visible openings.
description_view_2: Front view with doors open, revealing an open central shelf and a drawer beneath, flanked by two closed compartments.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side with visible wood grain and angled legs.
